findings.issue: §04 impact line claims 'Replacing Centric eliminates a per-seat licence cost' — source PDF p.14 does not mention per-seat licence cost savings; this is an unsourced inference.
findings.fix: Drop the per-seat-licence claim, or cite a separate source. Keep the verifiable 80% time reduction.

findings.issue: §02 'What it does for you' header label retained from source-PDF deck; tone-of-voice prefers third-person institutional voice over second-person ('you').
findings.fix: Rename label to '02 · What it does' (drop 'for you'); body copy is already impersonal.

findings.issue: Screenshot alt texts missing a space before the trailing '·' separator (e.g., 'Material code search· Drag-and-drop' should be 'Material code search · Drag-and-drop'). Visible cap-num captions render correctly because of the surrounding HTML; only alt text and lightbox meta strings carry the typo.
findings.fix: Insert a space before the '·' in alt text and the openImpetusLightbox meta argument across all 10 cards.

findings.issue: PLM page mega-menu omits 'SwapEasy' and 'TMS' entries that the home page mega-menu carries; sibling drift but does not break navigation.
findings.fix: Resync mega-menu block with home page on next chrome sweep.

strengths: Hero subhead is exactly tone-of-voice register — outcome-first ('End-to-end product lifecycle'), names the displaced product (Centric PLM), no marketing voice.
10 screenshots all return HTTP 200, lightbox open + Esc-close works, captions verbatim from source PDF p.15-20 with role attribution (Designer / Technical Designer / Buyer / Product Manager).
§03 Rollout Status pills correctly stripped of parenthetical dates per brief instruction; pills now read as forward-looking inventory rather than time-binding promises.
§04 What Improved callout uses the spec'd light-green block with a separated 'Expected metric impact' card; format matches the canonical sub-platform template.
Section numbering contiguous (hero / 02 / 03 / 04 / 05) after Updates-Shipped removal — renumber correctly applied.
